subject: feat(brand): rebrand icon and static assets to Dracula theme palette
body:
Update the master SVG and all generated PNGs/ICO to use Dracula colors
instead of the old blue brand palette. Background #282a36, chart bars
in purple progression (#9b78d6 to #bd93f9), git nodes in Dracula green
(#51fa7b) and pink (#ff79c6), connectors in foreground (#f8f8f3).

Also updates PWA manifest theme/background colors, the pre-React
loading spinner in index.html, and the offline fallback page.

Tags: brand, pwa, ui, theme
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theming
Semver: minor
